name: Taal Volcano
eruptionHistory: Has erupted at least 34 times since 1572. The 1911 eruption killed 1,335 people. January 2020 eruption forced evacuation of hundreds of thousands.
description: Taal is one of the smallest and most active volcanoes in the Philippines. It sits within a lake inside a larger caldera, creating a dramatic 'volcano within a lake within a volcano' setting.
